title: grammitis sumatrana
intro: Grammitis sumatrana, also known as Sumatran Grammitis or Maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Grammitis sumatrana include treating various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
